flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Glen Oaks Community College rose 25% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.7k → $10.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Glen Oaks Community College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (13.1% → 11.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Glen Oaks Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Glen Oaks Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (53.7% → 64.4%).
